component.name: Linux Steam ModManager
component.summary: Manage mods for Steam games on Linux

description.p: Linux Steam ModManager (LSMM) is a native mod manager for Steam games on Linux. Download and install mods from Nexus Mods directly via nxm:// links, manage load order, resolve conflicts, and run FOMOD installers — all from a clean GTK4 interface optimised for the Steam Deck and desktop use.

ul.li: Direct Nexus Mods integration via nxm:// protocol handler
Automatic archive detection and installation (ZIP, 7z, RAR)
FOMOD installer support for complex mod configurations
LOOT load order sorting for Bethesda games
Multi-library support including Steam Deck SD card
Safe uninstall with file tracking and automatic backups
First-run setup wizard for Steam path and Nexus API key

description.p: Complete UI overhaul with GTK4/libadwaita redesign. Adds staging directory system, mod profiles, tab-switch refresh, SMAPI tolerant parsing, and app update checker.
Initial Flatpak release. Includes FOMOD installer, LOOT integration, NXM protocol handler, first-run wizard, and multi-library SD card support.
